original_image_tags: Large, red, hollow-letter stamp of the word "COPY" placed over the final two lines of text.

elements.description: Typed document containing the narrative of Kenneth Arnold. A red outline of the word 'COPY' is stamped over the text at the bottom of the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the same visual content: a red stamp of the word 'COPY' over the bottom text, with no contradictory details about visual elements.
